ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After choosing a matrix type and clicking "Create", the type will be selected by default the next time you open the matrix creation window.
ast.target: 选择矩阵类型并点击“创建”后，下次打开矩阵创建窗口时将默认选中该类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After entering a matrix and clicking "Create", the dimensions will be selected by default the next time you open the matrix creation window.
ast.target: 输入矩阵并点击“创建”后，下次打开矩阵创建窗口时将默认选中该尺寸。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rather than inserting a newline after each row of the matrix, all text will be placed on one line. This will allow the matrix to immediately work between inline (single) $-signs, as well as multiline $$-signs.
ast.target: 不在矩阵每一行后插入换行，所有文本将放在同一行。这将使矩阵可直接用于行内（单个）$ 符号之间，以及多行 $$ 符号之间。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Put matrix command on one line

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 Obsidian 矩阵菜单
